articles.title: THEM LEGALLY
articles.summary: Criminal hacker group USDoD has allegedly leaked 2.7BN records of personal information — including names, addresses, dates of birth, Social Security numbers, and phone numbers.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC REVEALS SYSTEM PROMPTS FOR CLAUDE
articles.summary: Anthropic has added system prompts and updated dates for all models.

articles.title: SALESFORCE INTRODUCES TEXT-TO-VIDEO GENERATION
articles.summary: Salesforce has introduced xGen-VideoSyn-1, a text-to-video (T2V) model that generates realistic scenes from textual descriptions. The model uses a video variational autoencoder (VidVAE) to compress video data, reducing computational demands, and a Diffusion Transformer (DiT) for improved temporal consistency and generalization.

articles.title: INFINITE DATASET HUB (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: Powered by phi-3-mini, this space uses a rarity prompt to generate data about any topic. It isn't the most accurate, but it is fascinating and powerful.

articles.title: NEURAL ASSETS
articles.summary: Neural networks can represent and manipulate 3D objects in 2D scenes by conditioning on per object representations. This work may well be the Holy Grail of 3D object disentangling.

articles.title: TEXT-GUIDED 3D ANIMATIONS
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced a new method called T3M for creating 3D animations guided by text inputs. Unlike previous techniques that relied only on speech, T3M allows for more accurate and customizable animations, making it a valuable tool for virtual reality, gaming, and film production.

articles.title: ARE YOU READY TO TRAIN YOUR AI MODEL ON NVIDIA® H200 GPU CLUSTER WITH INFINIBAND?
articles.summary: NVIDIA claims that the H200 SXM offers significant enhancements over the H100 SXM, delivering up to 45% better performance in generative AI and HPC tasks. Want to test it this autumn? Contact Nebius AI team.

articles.title: BIREFNET
articles.summary: New state of the art for background removal with bireference segmentation.

articles.title: RB MODULATION
articles.summary: Google has an extremely novel way to personalize diffusion models that outperforms a number of common methods. It is available for PyTorch and with some slight modifications can work with Flux.

articles.title: IMAGE EDITING WITH VISION LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: FlexEdit is an image editing method that combines Vision Large Language Models (VLLMs) with free-shape masks for more precise edits based on language instructions.

articles.title: AI COMPANIES ARE PIVOTING FROM CREATING GODS TO BUILDING PRODUCTS
articles.summary: AI companies are struggling to find product-market fit for LLMs, leading to significant investments yet limited commercial success. The five main challenges hindering AI product viability are cost, reliability, privacy concerns, safety and security issues, and user interface limitations. Overcoming these sociotechnical issues is critical for the effective integration and widespread adoption of AI in consumer products.

articles.title: D-ID LAUNCHES AN AI VIDEO TRANSLATION TOOL THAT INCLUDES VOICE CLONING AND LIP SYNC
articles.summary: D-ID has launched an AI Video Translate feature that clones the speaker's voice and syncs lip movements in translated videos. Supporting 30 languages, it seeks to reduce localization costs for global campaigns. It is available to subscribers, with plans starting at $56 per year. The technology competes with similar offerings from companies like YouTube and Vimeo, as well as numerous AI voice cloning tools.

articles.title: MY FRIEND, CLAUDE
articles.summary: This author's reliance on Claude, an LLM from Anthropic, for technical writing due to increased work demands highlights LLMs' growing utility in professional contexts. Despite needing expert verification, Claude's assistance has proven cost-effective and underscores a rapidly changing landscape for niche experts facing AI-driven automation. The author reflects on the potential shift in knowledge work as AI tools like Claude become more integrated into routine tasks.

articles.title: SHELLMATE AI (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: A Mac terminal productivity tool powered by OpenAI.

articles.title: QUICK FINE-TUNING OF PHI 3.5 (COLAB NOTEBOOK)
articles.summary: Quick fine-tuning script with Unsloth of the new Microsoft models.

articles.title: VYOND PUSHES AI VIDEO'S ENTERPRISE ERA
articles.summary: Vyond is an AI video creation platform targeted at enterprise use cases.
